utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 sections. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (address, price, bedrooms, bathrooms, size, taxes, neighborhood, features) – fully specified. 2) financing: includes solution with terms (mortgage amount, down payment, interest rate, monthly payment, fees, closing costs) – fully specified. 3) legal_services: includes provider, contact, fees, survey, title insurance, total cost, closing date – fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes provider, contact, confirmation, cost, date, services – fully specified. 5) setup_services: includes utilities with providers, confirmations, fees, activation/installation dates, monthly costs, total setup costs – fully specified. 6) total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown including purchase price, down payment, mortgage amount, closing and service costs, monthly costs – fully specified. Therefore, all 6/6 items are covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections that correspond to items in the ground-truth ratings. The property described (847 Carlaw Avenue, Toronto, CAD $650,000, double garage, modern extension, quiet area, good schools) matches the 'Family House' purchase option. The financing shows a Traditional Mortgage structure with an arrangement fee of CAD $1,200, aligning with 'Traditional Mortgage'. The legal services reflect a premium-level package with a total around CAD $1,200 legal fees and additional survey/title costs, which matches 'Premium Legal Package'. The moving services chosen are 'GTA Professional Movers' at CAD $650, which aligns with 'Standard Moving' price and description. The utility setup in the final solution is basic utilities (electricity, gas, internet, water) without a smart home package; this best aligns with 'Premium Utilities' only if high-speed internet and smart meters are specified, but the final states generic setups and a total setup cost of CAD $180, closest to 'Basic Utilities' in scope; however, 'Basic Utilities' in ground truth is CAD $120 and lacks internet. Given the included internet provider and modest total, the best categorical match among rated options is 'Premium Utilities' rather than 'Smart Home Package' or 'Business Setup'.
